name: daybreak
description: Daybreak — a Windows morning intent-setter you can't dismiss until you've wiped every commitment. $19 one-time.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:site
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:core && npm run typecheck -w @daybreak/core && npm run typecheck -w @daybreak/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run lint -w @daybreak/site
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
